raw_text: I accidentally ordered the wrong product today, but Blinkit's customer service was outstanding. I requested a return through the chat box right after delivery. They collected the item and processed my refund immediately. I am incredibly satisfied with this quick and hassle-free service. Thank you, Blinkit!"

Fast delivery, often within minutes. Easy-to-use and user-friendly interface. Wide range of products including groceries, fruits, vegetables, snacks, medicines, and household items. Saves time by avoiding trips to the market. Multiple payment options such as UPI, cards, net banking, and cash on delivery. Regular discounts, offers, and coupons. Real-time order tracking. Convenient for emergency or last-minute purchases. Good product quality and fresh groceries in many locations. Available in seve

bad experience from the blinkit that the product was ordered by mistake and it was also had and defect but the blinkit team refused to proceed with return also there is no chat option. it will not open after placing order of we had any problem then also we had to be silent and they it shows to reach out to the gmail and that people doesnot give a solution for the product such a 3rd class app

It was a very bad experience,, The delivery guy refused to deliver the doorstep...when informed I was not well to come downstairs je asked to cancel the order later another day, again they took an hour to deliver the order.... getting bad day by day...nd on the top of that charging us handling fee

already charges are high, no clear cut policies regarding refund, payment. whenever they feel like so. I read almost all reviews, most of the time 1 star, horrible experiences. In my case also, same happened, delivery charges, surcharges(applied suddenly) once you click to place order, cheating with customers. and refund after deducting cancellation charges, which I never received till date. pathetic

Very good service I realy appreciate for this task. Hope it will be keeping up ahead. when I used this app first it served good but now it is making disturbances as whenever I want to purchase any items it holds up showing unnecessary demand. So I can not buy any items presently. App operator is not perfect.

Terrible service. Anyone using it should not order food items, particularly that need refrigeration. I ordered protein shakes and rotten products have been delivered thrice! Three times and no improvement in service. Clearly, their stores need to be inspected by Food Authorities. I am not confident of what will come out in terms of storage facilities and conditions.

Horrible return policy. I bought a 45W PD 3.0/PPS upto 45W fast charging adapter but the charging was stuck at 18W on my Pixel 8 Pro. Customer service kept finding ways to prove how it is supposed to charge my Pixel at a very slow speed. They do not care about their customers and would sell them products that fake their details, without even testing them.

Very poor experience that I got today. CHIIII. NO CANCELLATION OPTION in the app. WHY?? Today, I ordered the same things thrice mistakenly due to network issues and no cancellation option?? Customer care didn't receive my call. UNINSTALL BLINKIT 😡😡

Worst shopping app. No payment method works, so placing an order is impossible. This app wastes customers' time. If you can't provide a working payment system, there's no point in using the app. Very poor experience.

Pathetic service. They didn't properly deliver the ordered items and the money was not refunded to me. I contacted them immediately after I realised that the delivered items were incomplete but the call was redirected to a machine. When I approached their customer service they made me communicate with 4 different people and still the problem was not resolved and the next day they used the excuse of the complaint window being closed after 24 hours and hence my complaint will not be resolved.

the app doesn't allow me the option for cash on delivery. l would like to say that many people who are new to online shopping are not comfortable in sharing their bank details for payment. Hence, kindly revoke that ban Secondly once l ordered something and delivery charged me extra ₹30 since he wasn't able to figure out my address and behaved rudely. Rest l was initially satisfied with the fast delivery and the quality of products delivered. Rest the app is 10/10 for me.

The delivery was good, but I ordered Drools cat food that included free creamy lickable cat treats. I only received the cat food, and the free treats were missing. When I tried to report the issue or request a return, there was no option available in the Blinkit app. This was a very disappointing experience. Please look into this issue and provide the missing free treats or an appropriate resolution.

the app had so many glitches, the same order was placed 5 times, there was not proper option for cancellation, even in customer support the agent was not reading me messages unless I started spamming.. the delivery partner was also very troubled because they had to wait for over an hour for the order to be cancelled, please make your app more convenient for cancellations.

blinkit is a third class app when you want to return some defective product they refer you to product brand for resolution means you purchase from blinkit and then wander to all the place s to get your defective product returned or replaced .better to shop from local shop if you don't want to loose your hard earned money they just cheat you by sending defective item and not getting it back within a period of day one even.

Hello Blinkit Team, I really enjoy shopping on Blinkit because the delivery is fast and the product quality is good. I have one suggestion. While quantity options are available, many popular rice brands are not. In local grocery stores, customers can choose from a much wider range of brands. It would be great if Blinkit could add more rice brands and give customers a larger variety to choose from. This would make grocery shopping even more convenient. Thank you for considering this suggestio

Very disappointing experience. I ordered water because I was unwell. The app showed 24 minutes, but it was delayed by over 30 minutes. Customer support told me the delivery couldn't be completed, so I cancelled the order. Right after that, the delivery partner arrived at my door. Due to Blinkit's poor coordination, my order was cancelled and now I have to wait 2–3 days for my refund. Very poor service. don't trust on this application

Absolutely amazing experience with Blinkit! The delivery is incredibly fast, often arriving even before the estimated time. The groceries and vegetables are always fresh, and the packaging is neat and secure. It has made my daily shopping so much easier. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quick and reliable service!

Very disappointing experience. I ordered a fragrance gift set for gifting, but it arrived with damaged packaging. When I requested a replacement, customer support dismissed my concern by saying, "It's not even that torn." No resolution was provided, yet Blinkit claimed they had made every effort to address the issue. I paid for a new gift item, not a damaged one. Extremely unprofessional customer service and poor quality standards. Won't be ordering again.

BLINKIT IS PLAYING GAME WITH CUSTOMERS VERY CUNNINGLY. - Very difficult to find the order cancellation option. When I request a refund, it is converted into a promo code instead of being refunded to my original payment method. I was also told the promo code would appear within 1–2 hours, but it never showed up. On top of that, there is no proper way to contact customer support or explain my issue, as the chat only provides fixed options and doesn't allow me to describe my problem properly.
